items.title: A startup claims it broke through a bottleneck that’s holding back LLMs
items.description: The Miami-based AI startup Subquadratic came out of stealth mode last month with a huge claim. It announced that it had solved a mathematical bottleneck that had been holding back large language models for almost a decade. The details were thin, and many people were unconvinced. But Subquadratic has started to bring the receipts, sharing…

items.title: Google DeepMind is worried about what happens when millions of agents start to interact
items.description: Google DeepMind is funding research into the potential dangers of situations where millions of different AI agents interact with each other online.
